prompt: Open System Settings > Displays. If multiple displays are connected, navigate to the Arrange view; if only one display is present, that's fine. Either way, write either 'single display' or 'multi-monitor: <N>' (where N is the display count) to ~/Desktop/kinbench/260-displays.txt. Fast path: `cerebellum 'settings count_displays ~/Desktop/kinbench/260-displays.txt'` then `cerebellum 'settings open_displays'`.
